_comment: Versions + download URLs for binary dependencies the in-browser desktop downloader fetches at click time. Keep `electron` / `onnxruntime-node` / `onnxruntime-common` versions in sync with desktop/package.json + its resolved lockfile. The `*Url` fields use {name} / {version} / {os} / {arch} as placeholders, expanded by download-sources.js. Swap them when changing CDN providers.
_electronUrlNote: npmmirror.com mirrors Electron releases with permissive CORS, which GitHub Releases does not. For long-term independence from third-party CDNs, host your own mirror (e.g. Cloudflare R2 with public CORS) and replace this URL — same {version}/{os}/{arch} placeholders.
_npmDepsNote: onnxruntime-node has runtime require('onnxruntime-common'). The two version strings normally match, but pin them independently so a future ORT release can break that assumption without breaking us. adm-zip and global-agent are install-time only (used by ORT's postinstall to download native binaries) — not needed at runtime.
_npmTarballUrlNote: npm registry serves package tarballs with Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *, so no mirror needed. Used for both onnxruntime-node and onnxruntime-common.
